raw_output_payload.reasoning:
Need find foo, then ls -l sorted by modification date. Use find /workspace -name foo -exec ls -l {} + | sort -k6,7? Actually ls -l gives date columns. Better use find ... -printf "%T@ %p
" | sort -n | cut -d' ' -f2- | xargs ls -l. Simpler: find /workspace -name foo -printf "%T@ %p
" | sort -n | cut -d' ' -f2- | xargs -d '
' ls -l. Provide one line.
